meaning: n.木材业adj.笨拙的,动作迟缓的
examples: Surely this lumbering herd must have had an effect on prices?
They're serving this huge, lumbering, strange guy, Peter the Great.
India is often portrayed as an elephant: big, lumbering and slow off the mark.
Unfortunately, the lumbering sturgeon proved all too easy to catch, and their U.S. population quickly hit the skids.
Instead you get a muddled policy mess that is cumbersome, lumbering, and which satisfies no one.
